range.title: Range
range.description: Select a value in a numeric range defined in parameters

note.title: Note
note.description: Show the user some text without asking for input

calculate.title: Calculation
calculate.description: Record the result of the expression in the calculation column

acknowledge.title: Acknowledge
acknowledge.description: Prompt the user to acknowledge a statement

select_one.title: Select one
select_one.description: Select a single choice from a list

select_multiple.title: Select multiple
select_multiple.description: Select any number of choices from a list

select_one_from_file.title: Select one from file
select_one_from_file.description: Select a single choice from an attached CSV/XML/GeoJSON file

select_multiple_from_file.title: Select multiple from file
select_multiple_from_file.description: Select any number of choices from an attached CSV/XML/GeoJSON file

rank.title: Rank
rank.description: Rank the choices of a list in order

repeat.title: Repeat
repeat.description: A repeating group of questions (begin_repeat / end_repeat)

datetime.title: Date & time
datetime.description: Prompt for a date and a time

geoshape.title: Geoshape
geoshape.description: Record a closed polygon of locations

start-geopoint.title: Start geopoint
start-geopoint.description: Automatically record the location when the form is opened

background-audio.title: Background audio
background-audio.description: Record audio in the background while the form is filled

barcode.title: Barcode
barcode.description: Scan a barcode or QR code

csv-external.title: External CSV
csv-external.description: Attach a CSV dataset for instance() lookups (name without extension)

start.title: Start time
start.description: Record when the form entry started

end.title: End time
end.description: Record when the form entry was finalized

today.title: Today
today.description: Record the day the form entry started

deviceid.title: Device ID
deviceid.description: Record the device's unique install ID

username.title: Username
username.description: Record the username from app settings

phonenumber.title: Phone number
phonenumber.description: Record the phone number from app settings

email.title: Email
email.description: Record the email address from app settings

simserial.title: SIM serial (legacy)
simserial.description: Record the SIM card's serial number (blank on modern devices)

subscriberid.title: Subscriber ID (legacy)
subscriberid.description: Record the SIM's subscriber IMSI (blank on modern devices)

audit.title: Audit
audit.description: Log the user's actions as an attached CSV
